content.body:
Remove RuntimeConfig.Tiers and UserConfig.Autonomy from the persisted config
struct; add upgrade scrub step that strips residual tiers/autonomy keys from
existing config.yaml files on disk. Generated runtime context files retain the
autonomy section using the "balanced" hardcoded default.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(config): drop retired tiers and autonomy config fields (#74)
content.summary:
drop retired tiers and autonomy config fields (#74). Remove RuntimeConfig.Tiers and UserConfig.Autonomy from the persisted config
struct; add upgrade scrub step that strips residual tiers/autonomy ...
